OVERLAY_HOOK_1: The action is clear, the resistance is loud, and every cycle you choose the resistance, you deepen the loop.
OVERLAY_HOOK_2: Visions do not drift on their own, they drift when leaders keep mistaking procrastination for discernment.
OVERLAY_HOOK_3: Obedience becomes a reflex only after you stop negotiating with the delay and actually move on what you know.
